title: Impossible crafts now possible
body:
coming soon for more versions and more items

for fabric versions the [fabric api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) is mandatory

What does this model present in your game?

it adds new items to craft such as crafting a saddle, horse armor, totem of undying, among other things (all crafts are in the images tab)

If you find any bugs feel free to tell me and I'll fix them as soon as possible.

feel free to put this mod in modpacks

You can report bugs, make suggestions among other things through [Discord](https://discord.gg/VWnjD7JxpU)

you can see our Twitter [Here](https://x.com/Mods_ArthurOrsi)

• [My site](https://arthurorsi-mods.vercel.app/) •
